untranslatable_reason: Signal requires P/E ratio comparisons (stock P/E vs S&P 500 P/E) and CANSLIM criteria validation. P/E ratios and CANSLIM screening are fundamental metrics not available in the allowed indicator list, which contains only price action, moving averages, and oscillators. These would require external fundamental data feeds and custom screening logic outside the scope of technical indicators.
translation_notes: The signal references relative P/E valuation metrics and CANSLIM criteria which are fundamental analysis tools, not technical indicators. The backtest engine would need: (1) access to current and historical P/E ratios for individual stocks and S&P 500 index, (2) CANSLIM criteria evaluation logic (Current quarterly earnings growth, Annual earnings growth, New products/highs, Supply/Demand, Leader/Laggard status, Institutional sponsorship, Market direction). These require fundamental data integration beyond technical price/volume indicators.
